name: Tasque Manager
description: A task orchestration daemon that runs scheduled Claude Code tasks and delivers results via Discord threads with interactive follow-up.

name: Multi-Google MCP
description: MCP server for Claude Code supporting multiple Google accounts simultaneously — Gmail and Calendar across work, personal, etc.

name: Discord Self MCP
description: MCP server providing Claude Code with 64 Discord user account tools spanning messaging, server management, moderation, and more.

name: Canvas MCP
description: MCP server connecting Claude to Canvas LMS with 55 tools for courses, assignments, grades, discussions, and files.

name: Gradescope MCP
description: MCP server for Claude Code to interact with Gradescope — manage courses, assignments, submissions, grades, and regrade requests.

name: Piazza MCP
description: MCP server giving Claude access to Piazza with 22 tools for posts, answers, course management, and discussions.

name: Fitbit MCP
description: MCP server for Claude Code providing read access to Fitbit health data — sleep, heart rate, steps, activity, weight, SpO2, and more.

name: Fidelity MCP
description: MCP server enabling Claude to interact with Fidelity brokerage accounts via Playwright browser automation.

name: Jackdaw
description: A Balatro simulator built for reinforcement learning research, with a Gymnasium-compatible environment.

name: Yeen GPT
description: A small GPT language model trained from scratch with BPE tokenization, built with PyTorch.

name: Stoatix
description: Benchmarking suite with custom CI for measuring performance of algorithms.

name: MineCord Link
description: Minecraft Spogot plugin to link Discord and Minecraft chats.

name: Cache Simulator
description: A simulation tool to emulate how different cache policies affect miss rates.
